title: Practice Exercises
description: Extra practice: read code, predict what changes, and spot common mistakes.

flashcards.definition: On tests, a common skill is reading code and predicting what will change when a number changes.
flashcards.example:
Circle(200, 200, 50)
# What happens if radius becomes 80?

flashcards.definition: Case, commas, parentheses, and the number of arguments are frequent sources of errors.

quiz.prompt: What changes if you change the FIRST number in Circle(200, 200, 50)?
quiz.feedbackCorrect: Correct: the first number is centerX.
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: The first number is centerX, so it moves left/right.

quiz.prompt: Which line is missing a number?
